status_ja: ±15%を超える偏りは現時点でありません(判定継続中)
status_en: No segment deviates beyond ±15% ROI so far (evaluation continues)
comment_ja: 昨日は22勝25敗、損益-8.36uと厳しい一日。的中率は計303件累計54.5%。注目点はO/Uの不振で、13試合中わずか3的中と低調だった。勝敗予想では11勝13敗とやや劣勢。Chicago Cubs戦は勝敗・O/U・ランラインの3点すべて外れており、単試合での損失が目立つ結果となった。
comment_en: Yesterday ended at 22 wins and 25 losses with a -8.36 unit loss, a tough day overall. The cumulative record stands at 54.5% hit rate over 303 picks. A notable point was the poor performance on O/U markets, with only 3 hits from 13 picks. The Cubs game was particularly costly, going 0-for-3 across moneyline, O/U, and run line, representing one of the clearest single-game drags on the day.
